problem id: 61076abe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  00011010 -> 10100011
  00111110 -> 11100111
  01001010 -> 10101101
  00101000 -> 10000111
  10100001 -> 00011110
  11010101 -> 01011111
  01000010 -> 00101100
  10000101 -> 01011000
  11111000 -> 10011111

query: 11100011
predicted answer: 00111110
